name: Pats Hot Pepper Jelly
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup JALAPENO PEPPERS (SEEDS REMOVED AND CHOPPED)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place both bell peppers and jalapeno peppers in a blender container with 1 cup of vinegar.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a large, heavy-bottomed pan.
4. Rinse the blender container with the remaining vinegar and add it to the pan.
5. Follow the directions included with the pectin product regarding when to add sugar and pectin.
- For liquid pectin, stir in the sugar and bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat until it cannot be stirred down.
6. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
7. Skim any foam from the top of the mixture and discard.
8. Stir in the liquid pectin and food coloring.
9. Immediately pour the jelly into containers.
10. Seal or refrigerate until ready to use.
11. Serve with crackers, cream cheese, or cheddar cheese.
Note: To make the jelly hotter, blend the jalapeno seeds with the peppers before blending everything together.
